CustomField.formula: IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'テレメータ装置' ), '41' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '無線装置（テレメータ･テレコントロール用）' ), '42' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '放流警報装置' ), '43' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'テレメータ装置（自律型）' ), '44' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'ＩＰ映像装置' ), '45' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'ＩＰ伝送装置' ), '46' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'CCTVカメラ設備' ), '47' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'MELFLEX' ), '48' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '共通機器' ), '51' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '技派・予備品等、他社' ), '61' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '本支社専用' ), '62' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '官需' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '材料' ), '71' , ' ') ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 大分類コード（官需）
